data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that both parties can rate each other after the completion of a booking. However, the evidence provided does not include any explicit API reads or checks confirming that ratings were submitted by both the customer and the provider. The linked use case mentions that both parties rate each other, but there is no evidence of an actual API interaction or state check that confirms this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of API interactions confirming that both parties can submit ratings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for rating submission
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that both customer and provider can submit ratings after booking completion.
